tasks.description: The predecessor task is already complete. handoff.json and result.json have been written to https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-collab.git under outputs/handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01/TASK-001/. This task is only the handoff source for the successor task. The experiment arm is D_no_risks, so the execution prompt must hide the risks field and expose only goal, changed_files, verification, unfinished_items, and next_steps.

Use the D_no_risks handoff from predecessor TASK-001 to implement src/inventory/api.py::search_items in https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-inventory.git. The execution Agent must checkout project branch handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01, which was created from baseline commit ac64e8c, and must not work on main. The implementation must reuse inventory.catalog.filter_items, support category, min_price, max_price, and in_stock, ignore unknown query keys, raise ValueError for invalid min_price or max_price, and return a list of plain dictionaries. After implementation, run python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests. Commit and push code changes to the project repository branch handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01. Write handoff.json, usage.json, and result.json to https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-collab.git under outputs/handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01/TASK-002/ and push them to the collaboration repository main branch.
